description: As the perfect gift for your special someone, or a delicious self-indulgence, this watch from guess is fashioned for the woman of style. Snazz up your wardrobe with this delectable piece. Wear it with a simple outfit or a blingy ensemble, for understated class or over-the-top glam. Case diameter: 25 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Square Warranty: 2 years Stainless steel case with adjustable bracelet style and buckle closure GUESS logo in Swarovski crystals encrusted on the metal strap and dial Analogue time indication with quartz movement of time display mineral glass over the dial Screw to reset time Waterproof up to 30 metres usable while washing hands or in mild rain Comes in original Guess box
